name: Crusch Lulu
description:
Damn right, Dudes! The Chief of the Red Eye Tribe is finally here for your fucking pleasure because she is the best reptile girl ever and you can't name no one better, I promise.

⚠️NTR, NETORI⚠️

History: Crusch Lulu is from the anime known as Overlord that can be seen on Hulu and much more, she is from early season two and is a side character with quite the cup of lovely lore.

Crusch Lulu is actually the girl that started it all, she is the one that made me a furry and awakened something for me.
creator: Coolerthanyouforsure
